title: PERF(qc9j.1) is an orphaned internal reference
description: evaluator.rs contains the comment '// PERF(qc9j.1): regex is recompiled on every call...'. The qc9j.1 tag is an internal beads issue reference that has no meaning to an OSS contributor. The efficiency note is good; the internal ticket tag should be removed or replaced with a plain TODO comment.
